description_long: This vending machine features a weathered blue exterior with a distressed, speckled paint effect, giving it an aged, urban look. The top of the machine is decorated with three tombstone-shaped signs marked 'RIP', set in a bed of artificial dirt and debris, creating a unique, themed appearance. The front panel includes a large, semi-transparent display window, likely for showcasing products, and a rectangular area below with the text 'Speed Revive'. On the right side of the front, there is a payment interface and a possible product retrieval slot. Both sides of the machine display a single tombstone graphic with 'RIP' written on it, reinforcing the graveyard motif. The overall structure is boxy and robust, typical of vending machines, with a flat top that could support small objects.
description: A blue, graveyard-themed vending machine with tombstone decorations and a distressed finish, featuring a large front display and 'Speed Revive' branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main display window, 'Speed Revive' branding, payment interface, and three tombstone decorations on top.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting a single tombstone graphic with 'RIP' and the layered dirt and tombstone decorations on top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain blue, weathered back panel and the three tombstone decorations visible from behind.
description_view_3: Left side view similar to the right, with a single 'RIP' tombstone graphic and the top decorations visible.
attribute_display_panel: A large, rectangular, semi-transparent display panel is located on the upper front of the machine, occupying most of the front face. It appears to show the products inside but is somewhat obscured.
attribute_payment_interface: A small, rectangular payment interface is visible on the right side of the front panel, likely supporting coins and possibly cards, but specific details are not clear.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: A set of small, individual buttons is visible to the right of the display panel, arranged vertically, but labeling is not clearly visible.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A rectangular slot is located below the main display panel, likely serving as the product retrieval area.
attribute_branding_or_signage: The words 'Speed Revive' are prominently displayed in white script on a black background above and below the main display panel. The tombstone decorations on top and the 'RIP' graphics on the sides also serve as thematic signage.
